name: tutuca
description: Zero-dependency SPA framework with immutable state and virtual DOM

scripts.dist-all: bun run dist-immutable && bun run dist
scripts.release: bun run dist-all && bun run build-skill && bun run build-margaui-skill && bun run build-immutable-skill && npm publish --access public
scripts.release-dry: bun run dist-all && bun run build-skill && bun run build-margaui-skill && bun run build-immutable-skill && npm publish --dry-run
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write src test/*.js docs/src/*.js docs/examples/*.js tools/*.js tools/*/*.js
scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome lint src test/*.js test/*.js docs/src/*.js docs/examples/*.js tools/*.js tools/*/*.js
scripts.smoke-test: bun tools/tutuca.js lint ./test/todo.js && bun tools/tutuca.js render ./test/todo.js && bun tools/tutuca.js test ./test/todo.js && bun tools/tutuca.js lint ./test/json.js && bun tools/tutuca.js render ./test/json.js

author: Mariano Guerra
